topic: 为什么凌晨3点做的决定99%是错的
style_prefix:

segments.narration_zh: 你有没有凌晨三点冲动下单、深夜发分手消息、或者半夜突然决定辞职？醒来肠子都悔青了。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A person in bed, eyes wide open in the dark, holding a glowing smartphone. The screen shows three rapid-fire panels: a shopping cart with 'BUY' blinking, a chat bubble with broken heart emoji, and a resignation letter. In the morning, the same person sits up in bed, face in hands, looking horrified. A digital clock shows 03:00 then flips to 09:00.

segments.narration_zh: 这不是你意志力差——是你的前额叶皮质，在凌晨三点几乎彻底罢工了。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A cross-section of a human brain in profile, clean medical-illustration style. The prefrontal cortex area (front part) is highlighted with a glowing red outline. As a clock in the corner ticks from 21:00 to 03:00, the prefrontal cortex fades from bright red to dim gray. Chinese label: '前额叶皮质' with an arrow. The words '决策中心' cross out and become 'OFFLINE'.

segments.narration_zh: 前额叶是大脑的CEO——负责理性思考、控制冲动、预判后果。但它需要充足的睡眠来“充电”。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A friendly character representing the prefrontal cortex, wearing a tiny CEO badge and sitting at a desk with a computer showing '理性思考 / 冲动控制 / 后果预判'. The character has a battery icon on their chest. The battery drains from green (100%) to red (5%) as the clock advances. The character starts yawning and slumping over the desk.

segments.narration_zh: 而与此同时，你的杏仁核——大脑的情绪中心——在深夜反而格外活跃，像个失去刹车油门的跑车。
segments.visual_prompt_en: Same brain cross-section, now showing two regions. Prefrontal cortex: dim gray, labeled '理性 · 离线'. Amygdala (almond-shaped area deep in brain): bright pulsing red, labeled '情绪 · 全速'. A split-panel animation: left side shows a calm CEO sleeping at desk; right side shows a race car with smoking tires, no brakes, speeding on an empty highway at night.

segments.narration_zh: 科学家用fMRI扫描证实：熬夜后，前额叶和杏仁核之间的连接强度下降60%。理性管不住情绪了。
segments.visual_prompt_en: Two brain scan images side by side on a monitor. Left: '正常睡眠' - a thick bright line connecting prefrontal cortex and amygdala, labeled '连接强度 100%'. Right: '熬夜后' - the connection line becomes thin and dotted, flashing red, labeled '连接强度 40%'. Scientist character points at the dramatic difference. Chinese labels throughout.

segments.narration_zh: 更可怕的是，深夜的你还觉得自己特别清醒——这叫“睡眠剥夺的自我认知偏差”。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A person looking in a mirror at 3AM. The reflection shows a sharp, clear-eyed confident person wearing a cape labeled '我很清醒'. But the actual person behind the mirror is shown in an X-ray view: brain fuzzy, eyes droopy, thought bubbles filled with chaos symbols. Chinese text on mirror frame: '睡眠剥夺的自我认知偏差'. The mirror cracks slightly.

segments.narration_zh: 这就是为什么深夜下单的退货率高达40%、深夜发的消息让你第二天想删微信。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A calendar split: left side '03:00' shows a person clicking 'BUY' on dozens of items with hearts in their eyes; right side '09:00' shows the same person staring at a mountain of delivered packages, holding a return slip. Below, a chat interface shows a 3AM message with angry emojis, then at 9AM a hand reaching for the 'delete' button. Red percentage: '退货率 40%'.

segments.narration_zh: 所以，记住一条铁律：凌晨三点之后，不花钱、不表白、不辞职。先睡觉，醒了再说。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A warm bedroom scene at night. A nightstand with a phone face-down, a notepad with a pen laid across it, all under a soft warm lamp. A sticky note on the lamp reads '铁律: 不花钱·不表白·不辞职'. A person peacefully sleeping in bed, moon outside window. Calendar flips to morning: the same person wakes up refreshed, stretches, picks up phone with a calm smile. Golden morning light. Inspirational tone.

narration_script:
你有没有凌晨三点冲动下单、深夜发分手消息，或者半夜突然决定辞职？醒来，肠子都悔青了。

这不是你意志力差——是你的前额叶皮质，在凌晨三点几乎彻底「罢工」了。

前额叶是大脑的 CEO，负责理性思考、控制冲动、预判后果。但它需要充足的睡眠来「充电」。

而与此同时，你的杏仁核——大脑的情绪中心——在深夜反而格外活跃，像个失去刹车的跑车。

科学家用 fMRI 扫描证实：熬夜后，前额叶和杏仁核之间的连接强度下降 60%。理性，已经管不住情绪了。

更可怕的是，深夜的你还觉得自己特别清醒——这叫「睡眠剥夺的自我认知偏差」。

这就是为什么，深夜下单的退货率高达 40%；深夜发的消息，让你第二天想删微信。

所以，记住一条铁律：凌晨三点之后，不花钱、不表白、不辞职。先睡觉，醒了再说。
